Your Bee Band
Band 4 · School-Bee Ready · 80% right at this band

Coach's corner · picked for this week by the practice data
More tips ↻
Hard words
Trace the syllables on their palm as they spell each chunk: cal-en-dar. Touch anchors sequence.
Why now: 10 words on the review pile
Their words
On the review pile — “sacrilegious”: It is sacriLEGIOUS to mix up RELIGIOUS and SACRILEGE—note the LEGI in the middle.
Why now: from Ahana's own misses
Review
The missed-words list is gold: 10 minutes there is worth 30 minutes of new words.
Why now: 10 words to revisit
Bee day
Keep YOUR face calm in the audience: kids read parents' faces mid-word. Practise your poker smile.
Why now: 19 days to the bee
Nerves
Rehearse the worst case out loud once: 'if I miss, I sit down, and we get ice cream.' A named fear is a shrunken fear.
Why now: competition is close
Motivation
Let them set next week's goal themselves — kids over-commit slightly and then defend their own promises fiercely.
Why now: daily coaching rotation
Tip library: 13,961 coaching tips, matched to your speller's data.

Champion's Quest
one quest · three paths

Pick the path that fits today — the other two stay one tap away in your list row, with all progress kept.

Bizzing Bee Journey
THE CLASSIC CHAMP LADDER
~1,600 top bee words ramped easy→hard across 20 Levels. Master each Level (or pass its Champ Challenge) and evolve all the way to Bizzing Bee Champ.
20 Levels → Champ
Champ Challenge test-outs
The Champion’s Library beyond
Choose this path →
Theme Journey
LEARN WORDS BY THEIR WORLDS
Pick 3–5 worlds you love — medicine, music, maps, myths & 50 more. Each theme becomes its own Level ladder, and mastery flows back into every list.
52 themes in 8 worlds
Each theme = its own ladder
Feeds Magic Squares in the Arcade
Choose this path →
My Own List
BRING OR BUILD YOUR LIST
Train on any list — North South Finals, Scripps Winning Words, or paste your own words and we enrich them with meanings, sentences and origins.
Every ready-made list
Paste your own words
Same Level ladder & games
Choose this path →
Switching paths never loses progress — every list keeps its own Level ladder, and you can hop between them from the Word Coach list row.
Story vault
6/100 word-history tales unlocked — one per Level you clear

Coach's corner · picked for this week by the practice data
More tips ↻
Hard words
Trace the syllables on their palm as they spell each chunk: cal-en-dar. Touch anchors sequence.
Why now: 10 words on the review pile
Their words
On the review pile — “sacrilegious”: It is sacriLEGIOUS to mix up RELIGIOUS and SACRILEGE—note the LEGI in the middle.
Why now: from Ahana's own misses
Review
The missed-words list is gold: 10 minutes there is worth 30 minutes of new words.
Why now: 10 words to revisit
Bee day
Keep YOUR face calm in the audience: kids read parents' faces mid-word. Practise your poker smile.
Why now: 19 days to the bee
Nerves
Rehearse the worst case out loud once: 'if I miss, I sit down, and we get ice cream.' A named fear is a shrunken fear.
Why now: competition is close
Motivation
Let them set next week's goal themselves — kids over-commit slightly and then defend their own promises fiercely.
Why now: daily coaching rotation
Tip library: 13,961 coaching tips, matched to your speller's data.
